name: preregistration_stepfunction_features_20260515
user_goal_quote: create step-function better features for this codebase. act as a 100x researcher. consult codex cli and gemini cli. explore every angle. maximize utilization on the remote server (ssh -p 2243 fiod@165.22.71.91). use web search. use sota ideas. pick the right metric to assess feature descriptiveness only and optimize against it.

metric_choice.definition: Partial distance correlation between candidate feature block F and target y, conditioned on the canonical pipeline's leave-one-out prediction (iter34 for T1, iter47 for T3). 1-D conditioner sidesteps high-dim curse-of-dim conditioning on full V2.
metric_choice.secondary_definition: Information Imbalance change from adding F to V2's feature space, measured by Glielmo PNAS Nexus 2022 kNN-rank statistic.
metric_choice.rationale: Both metrics are model-free, fold-local at score time, leakage-clean (the canonical OOF is per-subject leak-clean by F65 audit, the metric uses train-fold-only data for each fold). pdCor has known null distribution and bootstrap CIs detect smaller effect sizes than CCC MDE at N=92.
leakage_audit_appendix: pdCor uses train-fold-only F and y in every fold; test-fold y never enters metric for that fold.
I_imb is purely distance-based, no learner involved.
Both primary + secondary computed via metric_lib.py; firewall_check.py confirms 0 banned patterns in metric_lib.py + run_pdcor_score.py + cache_stepfunction_features.py.

decision_rule_per_feature_block.rule: F is descriptive iff ALL of: (a) 95% bootstrap CI of fold-aggregated pdCor excludes 0; (b) cohort permutation p-value < 0.01 / k for k blocks tested (Bonferroni); (c) ΔI_imb 95% bootstrap CI excludes 0; (d) downstream Ridge stack on canonical-OOF residuals produces ΔCCC ≥ +0.025 with bootstrap frac>0 ≥ 0.95.
members: mfdfa_features (Multifractal singularity spectrum on stride series)
stacked_top_pdcor_v2 (V2 columns selected by pdCor > 0.10, no new feature extraction)

spd_features.mechanism: Per-window 13x13 IMU covariance matrices, log-Euclidean tangent vectorization, eigenvalue spectrum + tangent-PC summaries per subject. Captures whole-body coordination geometry orthogonal to V2's univariate-sensor statistics.
spd_features.leak_clean_status: TARGET-FREE extraction; fold-locality at score time only.
spd_features.novel_vs_walls: Not on any F-wall under same architecture. V3-GSP wall was static body graph; SPD is full covariance manifold.

klc_features.mechanism: Forward-integrate IMU orientations + accelerations through pelvis-thigh-shank-foot kinematic chain; residual to physical floor constraint at stance + bilateral toe-toe closure during double-stance. Integrates tremor / rigidity jitter that windowed-spectral V2 averages away.
klc_features.leak_clean_status: TARGET-FREE extraction; per-subject fixed body segment lengths (population averages).
klc_features.novel_vs_walls: Not on any F-wall. Gemini-suggested dark horse 2026-05-15.

crqa_features.mechanism: Cross-recurrence quantification (RR/DET/LAM/TT/L_max) on bilateral phase-space pairs (L<->R foot, L<->R wrist, sternum<->sacrum, etc). Captures phase-coupling breakdown.
crqa_features.novel_vs_walls: cache_cross_sensor_coherence used spectral coherence; CRQA is recurrence-based, fundamentally different.

mfdfa_features.mechanism: Multifractal DFA (Kantelhardt 2002) on stride-time + stride-amplitude + trunk-pitch series. Singularity spectrum width Δα and asymmetry; Hurst exponent.
mfdfa_features.leak_clean_status: TARGET-FREE; per-subject stride detection from foot-accel peaks.
mfdfa_features.novel_vs_walls: Not on any F-wall. cache_nonlinear_dynamics has single-q DFA; multifractal Δα is a different feature.

ph_features.mechanism: Persistent homology H0/H1 on Takens delay embedding of trunk pitch + sacrum angular velocity. SW1PerS-style periodicity + H1 lifetime entropy. Fallback to spectral graph approximation if ripser unavailable.
ph_features.novel_vs_walls: Not on any F-wall. Direct from Biomed Signal Proc & Control 2025 PD paper.

stacked_top_pdcor_v2.mechanism: Stakeholder-defining experiment: select V2 columns whose pdCor(V2_j; y | yhat_iter34_OOF) > 0.10, build Ridge meta-stack on canonical-OOF residuals using selected columns. NO new feature extraction. Tests whether step-function lives in SELECTION RULE, not in new features.
stacked_top_pdcor_v2.leak_clean_status: Fold-local pdCor selection at score time; per-fold Ridge meta uses fold-local imputer + normalizer.
stacked_top_pdcor_v2.novel_vs_walls: Not on any F-wall. This is the highest-value experiment in the session - if it works, it changes the project's architecture; if it fails, it confirms iter34 saturates V2.

compute_plan.primary_substrate: ssh -p 2243 fiod@165.22.71.91 (RTX 4060, 17 cores, 8GB GPU, idle at session start)

five_null_gate_per_block.scrambled_y: Refit metric on permuted y; pdCor must collapse to chance distribution.
five_null_gate_per_block.sid_shuffle: Shuffle SIDs between feature cache and OOF; pdCor must collapse.
five_null_gate_per_block.canary_noise: Add isotropic noise to F at sigma=0.01; pdCor must drop <5%.
five_null_gate_per_block.library_exclusion: Static scan for XGBRanker / T_grid / fit(X_all, ...) patterns: zero hits.
five_null_gate_per_block.transductive_vs_inductive: Inductive pdCor (fold-local OOF) vs transductive pdCor (cohort OOF). Gap must be < 0.005.

kpis_for_step_function.primary: ΔpdCor_median ≥ +0.05 for at least one feature block, with 95% bootstrap CI > 0 AND Bonferroni-corrected perm p < 0.01.
kpis_for_step_function.deployment_secondary: Downstream Ridge meta-stack on canonical-OOF residuals produces ΔCCC ≥ +0.025 with bootstrap frac>0 ≥ 0.95.
kpis_for_step_function.publishable_outcome_negative: If all 6 blocks fail the primary KPI, evidence is strong that the IMU-information ceiling at N=92 is saturated by V2 + iter34/iter47 architecture. Paper pivots to 'Information-theoretic ceiling analysis of IMU-derived UPDRS-III prediction at N=92' as central methodological contribution.
kpis_for_step_function.publishable_outcome_positive: ANY winning block becomes the SECOND headline result of the paper; rerun on T1 + T3 to characterize generalization. PPMI replication blueprint extends to the winning feature family.

do_not: Use test-fold y in any feature extraction step.
Use HC subjects as anchors or normalization references (HC anchors hurt inductively).
Recompute pdCor on the full N=92 after seeing per-block results (selection leakage).
Use LightGBM device='gpu' (2.2x slower than CPU at N<200).
Trust a single metric — both pdCor AND ΔI_imb must agree for a positive finding.
Trust a marginal cohort-level p-value without the fold-local bootstrap CI agreeing.
